## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and lead generation efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance has improved with an 80% jump in impressions and increased clicks](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [32 leads generated from GrowthX content in April, resulting in 3 SQLs but no opportunities yet](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Need to analyze content performance more deeply to optimize for lead quality and conversion](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Publishing issues with Webflow need urgent resolution to maintain content output](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=599.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [80% jump in impressions and significant increase in clicks](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [Average position improved to 17.2, moving into top 10 keywords](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Improvement likely due to recent schema updates and Google algorithm changes](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Total of 8,000 clicks from GrowthX content out of 21,000 monthly average visits](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)

### Lead Generation Analysis

  - [32 leads generated from GrowthX content in April](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [3 SQLs created from these leads, no opportunities yet](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Total inbound leads for April: 154](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)
  - [Need to investigate why 8,000 visits from GrowthX content resulted in 32 leads, while remaining 14,000 visits generated \~120 leads](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)

### Content Strategy Optimization

  - [Team to categorize articles and analyze performance by content type](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Focus on identifying high-intent keywords and topics that drive SQLs](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Three SQL-generating articles in April focused on video commerce topics](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [Plan to map content to opportunities to find themes for future articles](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)

### Publishing Issues

  - [Unable to publish last 10 articles due to Webflow access problems](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [Issue persisting for 4-5 days, impacting content output](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Team to escalate to Webflow, leveraging enterprise client status and SLA](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create reports on clicks and impressions by content cluster and page](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)
  - [Analyze which keywords/pages generated leads and their ranking](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [Investigate the gap between total leads (154) and GrowthX-attributed leads (32)](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [Develop a game plan to address key areas for improvement in May](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Move GrowthX-related communications to dedicated Slack channel for better visibility](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=2021.0)
  - [Escalate Webflow publishing issue to higher levels, including VP of Sales if necessary](https://fathom.video/share/PCYyyK8bCfatFsGTkxMXK4j1K5nUxLfH?tab=summary&timestamp=1890.0)
